main.headline: After a Bitter Split, European Leaders Play Nice With Trump
main.dek: A peace framework with Iran, and hope for cooperation with Ukraine, softened the tone at a Group of 7 gathering in France.

image.caption: Leaders at the G7 round table

main.body: The shift in mood was striking after months of acrimony, with leaders publicly praising one another's resolve while privately conceding how far apart they remain on trade and security policy heading into a fraught autumn.

main.headline: How Ukraine Uses A.I. to Knock Deadly Russian Drones Out of the Skies
main.dek: Interceptors show Ukraine's embrace of autonomous technologies trained on immense troves of wartime data.

main.headline: Ukraine Targets Moscow Oil Facility With Drones
The War in Iran Has Permanently Altered the Global Economy
main.dek: Despite a framework deal, the war has set in motion changes that will be hard to reverse.

image.caption: Crowds with flags in the street

main.body: Energy markets, shipping lanes and fertiliser prices have all moved, and economists say the new normal will outlast any ceasefire that diplomats manage to broker in the coming months.

main.headline: War Hangs Over American Farmers as Fertilizer Prices Rise

rail.headline: Here Are the 2026 James Beard Restaurant Award Winners
rail.dek: Kalaya took the outstanding restaurant award and Michael Tusk took home the outstanding chef honor.

image.caption: An awarded chef in the kitchen
